item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends. i hope you had a frank and productive holiday
that's adorable
they always ask you to do that
mamma mia
wait what
happy thanksgiving friends
never fails
why is this so true
there's pictures of horses and milk so you know it's legit
mmm hmm
i.. don't know
i hope it's not licorice
cool thanks
shimp time
time for another eye washing
finally
dang
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Smol dump of legally stolen memes and things
item.description:
Be honest.
.
Would do.
.
The ancient battle persists.
.
I may be a bit manic.
It often loses.
.
.
When it's the end of the year and everything is a blur.
.
.
Mood.
.
Times are tough this holiday.
.
Like really tired.
.
1, 2 my traumas not meant for you
.
House Gecko Tax.

item.title: My cosmic deer decoration
item.description: Bsky seemed to like this a lot so I figured I'd share here. He's really cool and looks extremely fake (it is not fake at all) My mom ordered one, and it arrived busted so she complained and they sent her another one, so she gave me the broken one (nothing that a little tape couldn't handle). The thing is like $300 on its own but it's so friggin cool looking. Photos and videos, whether it's lit up or not, make it look like I 3D rendered something and placed it in it's such a pain in the ass to put together, I do not think it'll survive a winter let alone a strong wind (it's super light), so I'm contemplating just letting it live in the house forever. It does have a metal frame on it sort of... But I feel like it'll just get ripped off of that anyway. I haven't had great luck with fairy lights surviving very cold conditions either Anyway hope you enjoy my deer. The same company makes a snowman, tree, and some various style snowflakes but that's really it. Would've been nice if there were a couple different poses of deer to put together a little flock. Maybe next year
item.dc:creator: the9mm

item.title: Making the most of the only guitar I have left.
item.description: This is a one string kids learning guitar I found for 2 bucks at a local thrift store. I have had a few guitars over the years but never had time to learn to play them, so this one I am just toying with. What you hear me playing in this video is just a song I came up with. Honestly like the sound of it and I could probably make it better if I tried. Oh and the plunking sound in the back ground is my degus. They are chewing the bars of their cage to make music too lol. The guitar is called a Tinkertar if anyone wants to order one for their kid. They have a bunch of different shapes and types.
item.dc:creator: drousnavat

item.title: My first cake day dump. Have some memes that have made me laugh, and a few that have made my SO moister than an oyster.
item.description:
Dinner time!
Glorious purpose!
Camera off and mute?
Meat popsicle.
Just hope it doesn't actually smell like a taco
...
Sploosh!
Nah, just enjoy the ride.
Ruffles Sour cream and cheddar chips!
Especially an overpriced stadium drink
KO
Yes, ma'am!
For us it's Ruffles Sour cream and cheddar chips.
You're in the Good Place!
Is that why it's was once called 'boning'?
Yup

item.title: Looks like I just needed a good cry after all
item.description:
A rescuer goes to the home of the dog whose life he saved years ago and their bond couldn't be purer
A father's joy when his daughter feels the sensation of walking for the first time, in a machine he built
Care workers surprise this 94-years-old veteran with a pillow of his wife's face after seeing he slept next to her photograph
Fathers reaction to his daughter winning 4 awards in school
Girl who used to be paralyzed surprises her old nurse by walking
It’s a tradition in Brazil to give the first piece of cake to the person you love the most
She surprised her best friend, whom she hadn't seen for a while, by coming to her graduation because she moved to another city.
The boy with non verbal autism says 'I love you daddy' to his dad for the first time.
The moment when this little girl met her brother and sister, who had not been able to meet her siblings because she had been treated for cancer in the hospital
This father cycles 1,400 miles to hear his daughter's heartbeat on Father's Day
This father's reaction to his daughter becoming a nurse.
This sweet grandma couldn't get her neighbours on the phone so she walked over and left a message, inviting them over for Tacos, on their doorbell camera
When older brother realized that the kidney donor was his younger brother
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: "My friend and I are weird and send each other weird things" dump #126
item.description:
Back by unpopular demand: me!
Apparently it was my cake day the other day so this is also a belated cake day dump.
Kinda fitting, considering what concert my asshole is taking me to.
*cries in Sleep Token*
It's almost like they can't hear me!
Till then - stay spooky!

item.title: Delivering lifesaving moments and your mail too!
item.description: Elderly Illinois man invites postal worker to Thanksgiving dinner after the worker saved him when he fell and hit his head while walking his dog. Jaylen Lockhart was working his postal route in Aurora, IL when he saw 75-year-old Guy Miller take a nasty fall. Lockhart jumped into action, applied pressure to his head wound and called 911. He then ran to Miller's home to notify his wife. "No matter where you are, no matter what you’re doing, you always have time to stop and help," Lockhart said. Miller says he considers Lockhart family now. "It’s kind of a bad thing that this is how I got to know Jaylen, but in a good sense, it’s a good thing. Because I gained another friend." The Lockhart and Miller families will be spending Thanksgiving together this year.
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
TheFreePizzaDude is back for a holiday week post! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get a holiday meal there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been such a big part of us being able to help more Imgurians and we love you so much https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
The Pucketts are running to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
14,599 meals since we started 922 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 230 1st and 2nd by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 245 3rd, 4th, 5th and 6th by @OP 300 7th and 8th by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 310 9th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 340 10th, 11th, 12th and 13th by @OP 355 14th, 15th, 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 440 18th, 19th, 20th and 21st by @OP 520 22nd, Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @hwatL4bloopy 535 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 555 27th, 28th, 29th and 30th by @OP 605 31st by Pizza Angel @zelda633000 630 32nd and 33rd by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 645 34th and 35th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 700 36th, 37th, 38th and 39th by @OP 710 40th and 41st by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 730 The Meaning of Life, the Universe, and Everything by Pizza Angel @OneFustyWeeDram 750 43rd by Pizza Angel @StabbyTheCat 800 44th by Pizza Angel @OneFustyWeeDram ... Today's Grocery Tally 600 1st by Grocery Angel @Srtabilingueteacher ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 44 meals Filled 1 huge grocery orders That's 14,643 meals since we started 923 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
